object_a.label: wall feature
object_a.long_form_open_description: Traditional-style fireplace with white painted mantel and surround. Firebox opening is dark, likely gas or decorative. Mantel has molding detail and sits under a wall-mounted TV. Fireplace is centered on the far wall beneath the vaulted ceiling.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: centered on far wall; directly below the wall-mounted TV and between two windows
object_a.object_text_long: center sector | Traditional-style fireplace with white painted mantel and surround. Firebox opening is dark, likely gas or decorative. Mantel has molding detail and sits under a wall-mounted TV. Fireplace is centered on the far wall beneath the vaulted ceiling.

object_b.label: table
object_b.description: kitchen island with dark cabinetry and visible countertop in background
object_b.long_form_open_description: A rectangular kitchen island with a dark wood base and a lighter countertop located in the far center of the image. Island has seating/clearance around it and serves as a visual divider between living area and kitchen cabinetry behind.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Centered at the rear of the open-plan room; kitchen cabinetry and appliances are behind it
